description: Golden classification labels for eval. lint-bills.js fails if bills.json drifts from these. attackType null means the field must be absent (support bills are not incursions). When a classification legitimately changes, update this file in the same commit and record why in a decision note.

hr51.note: Washington, D.C. Admission Act — the flagship statehood bill

hr7881.note: Norton: DC Superior Court juror pay parity

hr5092.note: Norton: DC control of MPD; verified by title+sponsor only

hr9362.note: Norton: DC judge appointments without Senate consent

hr6950.note: Norton: DOT grant parity for DC

s4837.note: Van Hollen: Senate companion to H.R. 9362

s4150.note: Rick Scott: 60-day review of all DC laws + disapproval of DC executive orders/regulations

hr5103.note: Federal commission over DC crime/immigration + federal control of public spaces

hr8455.note: Make DC Square Again Act — redraws DC boundaries; primarily a Virginia redistricting play

s402.note: Documented divergence from scorecard author: structurally a prong-3 incursion (attackType direct) but content is benign and Norton sponsors the companion, so position is support. See METHODOLOGY.md edge case.
